[GAMEPLAY]
game_mode = ${DST_GAME_MODE}
max_players = ${DST_MAX_PLAYERS}
pvp = ${DST_PVP}
pause_when_empty = ${DST_PAUSE_WHEN_EMPTY}
vote_enabled = ${DST_VOTE_ENABLED}

[NETWORK]
cluster_name = ${DST_CLUSTER_DISPLAY_NAME}
cluster_description = ${DST_CLUSTER_DESCRIPTION}
cluster_password = ${DST_CLUSTER_PASSWORD}
cluster_intention = cooperative

[SHARD]
shard_enabled = true
bind_ip = 0.0.0.0
master_ip = 127.0.0.1
master_port = 10888
cluster_key = ${DST_CLUSTER_KEY}

[STEAM]
master_server_port = 27016
authentication_port = 8766

[MISC]
console_enabled = true
max_snapshots = ${DST_BACKUP_COUNT}
tick_rate = ${DST_TICK_RATE}
